title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your issue clearly, including dates, times, and any relevant details. Next, complete the Grievance Form available on the company intranet under the HR section. Once completed, submit the form to your direct supervisor or the HR department within 10 business days of the incident. If your concern involves your supervisor, you may submit it directly to HR. HR will acknowledge receipt of your grievance within 5 business days and will initiate an investigation, which typically takes up to 15 business days. You will be kept informed of the progress and any outcomes. For further assistance, you can contact HR directly at hr@company.com or call the HR hotline at (555) 123-4567.
